div.class: group flex flex-col transition-normal overflow-hidden w-full

a.class: block relative aspect-[2/3] overflow-hidden rounded bg-surface mb-2 flex-shrink-0

div.class: w-full h-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-surface to-card p-2 text-center

span.class: absolute top-1.5 left-1.5 bg-primary text-bg text-[8px] font-black px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded shadow-[0_2px_4px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] uppercase tracking-[0.5px] pointer-events-none z-[2]

div.class: flex justify-between items-center text-[10px] text-muted mt-1.5 mb-1 font-semibold font-sans

h3.class: text-xs md:text-sm font-semibold leading-snug line-clamp-2 text-text group-hover:text-primary transition-fast
